creator: jamie@catflap.org
text:
In bug #282901, des@ wrote:

"I believe they were asking how to link to a commit message in a Bugzilla comment, and the answer is to prefix the hash with either “base”, “doc”, or “ports”, for instance: base 3bfbb521fef5"

Can this information be added to bugzilla help? Namely, when you are writing a comment, and hit "preview" and then "quick editing help"

Also, this section currently contains a way to link to SVN, which you may want to remove.
